{{CargoRelic
|name=The Sand Reckoner
|class_id=22606
|rank=AAA
|affct=TECH
|birthday=07-25
|source=
|description=On Jul 25, 223 BC, Archimedes completed The Sand Reckoner.<br>In this book, Archimedes proposed a method for recording large numbers and used a similar scientific notation to calculate the approximate amount of sand needed to fill the entire universe. Of course, because he estimated the radius of the universe to be much smaller than modern scientists believe, the result of his calculation was naturally way off. However, this method of recording large numbers has timeless significance, demonstrating the wisdom of ancient Greek philosophers.
|fame=49
|art=38
|fth=45
|civ=39
|tech=72
|ss1=Minion Recovery SPD +1.5%<br>Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +12
|ss2=Minion Recovery SPD +2%<br>Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +16
|ss3=Minion Recovery SPD +2.5%<br>Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +20
|ss4=Minion Recovery SPD +3.5%<br>Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +28
|ss5=Minion Recovery SPD +4.5%<br>Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +36
|ss7=Minion Recovery SPD +4.5%<br>Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +36<br>Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +28 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Hellas skill II.png|50px]]Place in Hellenic Museum: In Hellas, 2x Orange Reagent Drops +7.5%
|skill2=[[File:Hellas skill II.png|50px]]Place in Hellenic Museum: This Relic's TECH +10
}}
